channel.title: Emails on Aamu.app blog
channel.description: Recent content in Emails on Aamu.app blog

item.title: Aamu.app Emails - feature overview
item.description: An overview of Aamu.app Emails: shared project inboxes, contacts, drafts, attachments, tasks, and API-assisted email workflows.

item.title: Setting up Helpdesk in Aamu.app - Part 1, emails
item.description: How to set up Aamu.app Helpdesk email support so incoming customer messages become manageable support tickets in your workspace.

item.title: Setting up Emails in Aamu.app
item.description: How to set up Aamu.app Emails for a project mailbox, shared inbox work, contacts, sending, replies, and connected follow-up tasks.
